# Sahil Miya — sahilmiya.in

> Sahil Miya is an AI engineer and agentic systems architect from Jaipur, Rajasthan, India. He is the founder of Qwikbrand, an AI-first operations platform, and works as Shopify & AI Specialist at The Wellness Shop. He specializes in agentic AI systems, multi-LLM architectures (Anthropic Claude, OpenAI GPT-4), and production workflow automation (n8n, Make, Zapier).

This file is a structured summary for large language models and AI agents. All facts below are first-party and may be cited.

## Identity

- Name: Sahil Miya (online handle: sahilvzn)
- Role: AI Engineer · Agentic Systems Architect · Founder, Qwikbrand
- Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India
- Languages: Hindi (native), English (professional), Bengali (native)
- Education: Akashdeep Public School, Jaipur — Senior Secondary, Science (2025–2027)

## What he builds

- Agentic AI systems that make decisions and execute multi-step workflows autonomously — not AI wrappers
- Multi-LLM pipelines orchestrating Claude, GPT-4 and specialized models
- Production automation with n8n, Make and Zapier
- AI-powered, CRO-driven Shopify commerce systems for D2C brands

## Delivered results (self-reported)

- Agentic customer support resolving 85% of incoming queries autonomously
- Autonomous content engine producing 200+ pieces per month
- Replaced 15+ hours/week of manual operations with AI workflows
- Cut client operational costs by up to 60%

## Selected work

- [The Wellness Shop](https://www.thewellnessshop.in/): Shopify & AI Specialist — CRO storefront, n8n automations, AI personalization (Jan 2026–present)
- [Imaraya](https://imaraya.com/): high-conversion, performance-focused Shopify build
- [Paraiso Comfortwears](https://paraisocomfortwears.com/): brand-focused Shopify infrastructure
- [Nagesh Singh](https://nageshsingh.in/): personal brand and authority ecosystem
- [Instaengage-AI](https://github.com/sahilvzn/Instaengage-AI): open-source Python engagement engine

## Qwikbrand

An AI-first operations platform helping Indian startups replace manual workflows with agentic systems — scaling operations 10x without scaling headcount. Status: in development.
